name: @drydock/daemon
comment: This process runs on NODE, not Bun: node-pty's native addon uses the V8 C++ API (v8::Value::ToString), which Bun's JavaScriptCore runtime doesn't provide — it loads but segfaults on first PTY spawn. Bun still manages deps, builds the addon (scripts/build-native.mjs), and runs everything else; `bun run` honors the explicit `node` here and routes to real Node. tsx runs the TS directly.
